assignments.direction: Implement a genetic algorithm with custom crossover and mutation operators tailored for job shop scheduling.
Develop a priority rule-based heuristic (e.g., SPT, LPT, or custom rules) and evaluate its performance.
Explore a local search method such as simulated annealing with neighborhood structures like swap or insert moves.
Implement a tabu search algorithm with short-term memory and aspiration criteria for job shop scheduling.
Develop a constraint programming model using a library like Google OR-Tools to solve the problem.
Explore a reinforcement learning approach, such as Q-learning, to dynamically schedule jobs.
Implement a particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm adapted for discrete scheduling problems.
Develop a hybrid approach combining a greedy algorithm with a local search refinement step.
